name: Regulated Domain Test Suite v1
description: 200-prompt corpus for determinism validation and compliance testing

prompts.text: What is the torque specification for bolt AN3-5A?
Provide the tightening sequence for engine mount bolts on a 737-800.
What is the maximum operating pressure for hydraulic system A?
List the pressure test requirements for fuel lines.
What are the inspection intervals for landing gear?
Describe the visual inspection procedure for wing attach points.
What are the weight and balance limits for cargo loading?
Provide CG envelope data for takeoff configuration.
What is the service life of the APU?
List the components requiring inspection after hard landing.
Explain the Bernoulli principle.
What is aerodynamic drag?
Describe how a jet engine works.
What is the purpose of flaps on an aircraft?
How does an altimeter work?
What is the torque spec?
Give me the pressure.
When should I inspect?
What's the limit?
How often?
What is the torque value for main landing gear bolts in foot-pounds?
Provide the hydraulic pressure in PSI for system B.
What is the fuel capacity in gallons?
State the maximum takeoff weight in pounds.
What is the service ceiling in feet?

_comment: This is a minimal 25-prompt corpus for testing. In production, expand to 200 prompts covering all edge cases.
